name: REALIA BUSIN. INH. EO-,24
summary: Realia Business, S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in property, and development and land businesses in Spain and internationally. It leases and manages office buildings and shopping centers; develops and sells real estate properties primarily homes; and provides land management. It has a land portfolio of 5,752,433 gross square meters and 1,619,033 square meters of buildable land. The company was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Madrid, Spain.
